summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.selfdev.genome.core; import java.time.Instant; import java.util.List; public abstract class GenomeArtifact { protected String id; protected String sourceProject; protected Instant timestamp; protected String topic; protected double fitness; protected List<String> tags; public abstract ArtifactType getType(); public String getId() { return id; } public void setId(String id) { this.id = id; } public String getSourceProject() { return sourceProject; }
